SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST KURTISS A. JACOBS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-02-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-17-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-05-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-05-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
